ALM-3050.issue: Slurry Supply Flow Low (研磨液供應流量過低)
ALM-3050.description: Detected slurry flow rate is below threshold (< 180 ml/min). This increases friction and may cause scratches.
sop_steps: 1. Check the slurry peristaltic pump (蠕動幫浦) RPM.
2. Inspect the slurry delivery tube for kinks or clogs.
3. Verify if the slurry tank level is sufficient.
4. If filter pressure is high (>20psi), replace the POU filter immediately.
ALM-3050.expert_note: If Motor Current is also high (>20A), it confirms high friction. Stop the platen immediately to prevent wafer breakage.

ERR-9999.description: Lost heartbeat from main sensor module.
ERR-9999.expert_note: Check if there was a power dip recently.
